text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Well, I think that's enough walking for now. ...Oh?

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, that'll bruise...
O-oh! I don't suppose you could lend me a hand?!
I've gone and taken a tumble on the way back
from my shopping run!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...?! Oh no... Here, take my hand. I shall see you
back to your residence.

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text:
Well, aren't you a kind young lady. Care to come
in for a cup of tea?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I would be most delighted. However, I must insist
on treating your injuries first.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Do you have any bandages in your medicine
cabinet? Also, would you mind if I used your
kitchen to prepare an herbal salve—

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text:
Oh deary, you don't need to be going to all that
trouble for little old me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It's quite all right... Sitting idle while another's
suffering is something I simply cannot do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps because she put so much effort into
helping the older lady, Mejiro Ardan is looking
fatigued.
